# Torah Tale

> AI-powered personalized Torah storybooks for frum Yiddishe kinderlach. Each book stars your child as the hero of a weekly parsha story, with cinematic illustrations and tznius, halachically-mindful content.

Torah Tale creates custom hardcover and softcover children's books featuring your child's likeness, name, and age. Stories are aligned with the weekly Torah portion and crafted for the Chareidi/Orthodox Jewish community.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, gallery, and how it works.
- [About](/about): The story and values behind Torah Tale.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Book formats, subscription plans, and one-time options.
- [How it works / Create](/create): Walk through the personalization wizard.
- [FAQ](/faq): Answers about shipping, customization, billing, and content.
- [Testimonials](/testimonials): Reviews from families.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the team.

- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
